offplanDescription: DAMAC Canal Heights is in the spirited financial district of business bay, surrounded by other stylish high rises, trendy apartment buildings and popular hotels.
developerSummary: DAMAC Properties has been at the forefront of the Middle East’s luxury real estate market since 2002, delivering award-winning residential, commercial and leisure properties across the region, including the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Jordan, Lebanon, Iraq, Maldives, Canada, the US, as well as the UK.
propertyExplainer:
Welcome to Canal Heights, branded by de GRISOGONO

A luxurious waterfront living experience that embodies the beauty and perfection of nature’s most wondrous creation…. the blue pearl.

Canal Heights brings natural elements to life with a diverse range of amenities that promise year-round serenity and well-being. This stunning property encompasses a true gem of vibrant living, with one-of-a-kind multipurpose domes that serve as wellness cocoons, intimate dining experiences, and a perfect space for private parties and gatherings.

As a result of outstanding water features such as infinity lap pools and shell-shaped pools, this property offers a multifaceted lifestyle experience.
